title: Grilled Morcilla Rellena with Papas
description: A traditional Peruvian dish featuring grilled blood sausage stuffed with a delicate filling, served with crispy potatoes.

ingredients.name: Delicate Filling
ingredients.notes: mixture of chopped onions, garlic, and cheese

instructions: 2. Remove the casings from the morcilla and shape into patties.
3. Grill the morcilla for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add the chopped papa and cook until crispy, stirring occasionally.
6. Divide the delicate filling among the grilled morcilla patties.
7. Serve the stuffed morcilla with crispy papas and a side of rellena sauce, if desired.
